programme.title: Seinfeld S6E24
programme.desc: A special one-hour Seinfeld looks back at the first one hundred shows.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E1
programme.desc: After breaking up with their girlfriends, Jerry and George worry that they're destined to spend their aging years as lonely old men. As a result, Jerry resolves to make up with Melanie, while George sets out to find Susan, the NBC executive he used to date. Meanwhile, when Elaine's sleep is disturbed by a barking dog living near her new apartment, Kramer offers to get Newman to take care the noisy pet once and for all. While Jerry hears Kramer's warning about the pitfalls of marriage, George doesn't. And inspired by his fond memories of their relationship, George heads to Susan's apartment where he proposes on the spot. After breaking the news to his incredulous parents, George arrives to tell Jerry the news. However, when he learns that Jerry's reunion with Melanie was cut short because of her annoying eating habits, George has second thoughts about his proposal to Susan. Although she's against killing it, Elaine does agree to let Kramer and Newman kidnap the annoying dog and joins them on a mission to relocate it far from home. But after taking a bite out of Kramer's shirt, the dog finds its way home, where a telltale tag leads to Kramer, Newman and Elaine's arrest. Finally, when his plans to join Jerry for a movie are derailed, George's concerns about marrying Susan grow, especially after he can't watch an exciting baseball game on TV.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E2
programme.desc: Although Elaine refuses to admit it, George's upcoming wedding to Susan has her troubled. And when a rabbi in her building senses something is wrong and encourages her to speak freely, she admits to feelings of jealousy and resentment. Meanwhile, George continues having second thoughts about Susan and seeks Jerry's advice on postponing the Christmas wedding until the first day of Spring. When George raises the subject with Susan, he immediately backs down after she tearfully suggests that he really doesn't want to get married at all. However, after witnessing another man refusing to succumb to a woman's tears, he resolves to take control of the situation and insist on the postponement. While picking up Elaine for a movie, Jerry runs into the rabbi, who freely reveals the details of her confession. But the discovery that her secrets have been disclosed gets Elaine out of the mood to be with her friends. Meanwhile, at the theater with Jerry, Kramer tries to smuggle in a hot cup of coffee underneath his shirt -- with disastrous results. When he demands the postponement and ends up crying, too, George finds that his own tears have convinced Susan to agree. Confronting the indiscreet rabbi, Elaine discovers that his revelations just stop with Jerry. Meanwhile, as the newly liberated George suddenly feels Susan's reins tightening once again, Kramer reveals that he's suing over the burns he suffered from the hot coffee. Finally, when they happen upon the rabbi's cable TV show, George and Susan are shocked to discover they are the focus of his sermon.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E3
programme.desc: While shopping for new clothes at a store owned by her uncle, Susan does her best to change George's wardrobe. But he's preoccupied by a store security guard who spends all day standing on the job. And when George comes back later, the guard admits that a chair would be nice for a change. Meanwhile, Kramer and his attorney Jackie Chiles are certain they'll win big in his lawsuit against Java World. But when his friend, a police orchestra conductor who prefers to be called maestro, stops in with a special balm for his burns, it works too well and jeopardizes the lawsuit. When Java World offers free coffee for life to settle the suit, Kramer hastily accepts, unaware that they were also prepared to pay him $50,000. Then, during a dinner date, the orchestra conductor persuades Elaine to call him maestro, too. Meanwhile after listening to him brag about his home in Tuscany, Jerry refuses to believe maestro's claim that there are no other houses available in the Italian region. So, when he invites Elaine to join him in Tuscany, Jerry is determined to prove he can find a place of his own there, too. Though his lawyer is humiliated by the quick settlement, Kramer is anxious to start cashing in. But all that free coffee soon starts affecting on his behavior. And when Jerry gets a lead on a house in Tuscany, he's unable to refuse the offer and ends up renting a place he didn't really want. Meanwhile, after George provides him with a new rocking chair, the guard falls asleep on the job and the store ends up being robbed. Finally, while at his villa, Elaine and maestro are shocked to see their new neighbors...Jerry and Kramer.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E4
programme.desc: Though it's grapefruit juice that has caused George to wink uncontrollably, Yankee executive Mr. Wilhelm thinks he's hinting at a problem with his boss, Mr. Morgan, and Kramer takes it as an okay to sell an autographed birthday card intended for the team's owner. Meanwhile, after Elaine agrees to date her wake- up service man, James, she reveals that her cousin Holly found Jerry's new diet a problem during a recent date. So when Jerry joins the two cousins for dinner, Elaine borrows his jacket for the walk home, unaware it's hiding his serving of mutton in the pockets wrapped in a pair of old napkins. But when Holly discovers their Grandma Mimma's antique napkins are missing, she's sure Elaine is a thief. Although Kramer has already sold the card to a memorabilia dealer, George must get it back for Morgan to sign so it can be presented to Yankee owner George Steinbrenner. Because it now belongs to a boy hospitalized with a fatal disease, Kramer can get it only by promising that Yankee Paul O'Neill will hit two home runs in the next game. Meanwhile, to escape a pack of mutton-hungry dogs, Elaine seeks refuge in James's apartment. However, her spending the night causes him to oversleep. And when James forgets to wake his newest client, Mr. Morgan's late arrival at work causes Wilhelm to be concerned. While Holly is cooking pork chops for Jerry, Elaine shows up to meet James. And when he arrives with Jerry's jacket, Holly is upset to sees James's dogs wearing Mimma's napkins. Finally, after claiming responsibility for the circumstances that reflected poorly on Morgan, George gets the card back. But because it's been framed and Morgan is unable to sign it, George not only gets credit for a job well done, but is promoted when his boss is fired.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E5
programme.desc: Elaine has agreed to put up a marathon runner who once overslept and missed an Olympic race. But when her track record for lateness gives Jean-Paul reason to think he's picked the wrong host, Jerry takes responsibility for getting him to the New York City Marathon on time. To keep from being bothered at work, George adopts an annoyed look. But it suggests to his boss that he's working too hard. So Mr. Wilhelm asks him to relax by entertaining some visiting Houston Astros executives, whose casual use of profanity George quickly adopts. Meanwhile, a malfunctioning pump in his new hot tub causes Kramer's body temperature to plummet. When Mr. Wilhelm overhears some off-color banter with his Astros counterparts, he worries that George has gone over the edge. And after the colorful language rubs off on Jean-Paul, his comments to a single mother and neighbor of Elaine's create entirely the wrong impression. Meanwhile, after persuading Jean-Paul to stay in a hotel on the eve of the race, Jerry's doubts about the desk clerk responsible for his wake-up call send a frustrated Jean-Paul back to the Seinfeld apartment. As she's being accused of telling Jean-Paul about the child her neighbor bore out of wedlock, Elaine is unaware that the nosy Rabbi Kirschbaum is listening nearby. As a result, not only does the entire building now know the neighbor's secret, but they've all weighed in on Elaine's supposed relationship with Jean-Paul, too. And even though Kramer's powerful new hot tub pump causes a blackout which disables Jerry's alarm clock, Jean-Paul makes to the starting line as the race is beginning. But just as Jean-Paul takes the lead, he accidentally mistakes Kramer's cup of scalding hot tea for water.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E6
programme.desc: While on the way to a soup stand whose demanding proprietor's harsh rules have led to him being referred to as "The Soup Nazi," Elaine stops to buy a sidewalk vendor's antique armoire. But when she's unable to move it into her building on a Sunday, she hires Kramer to watch it on the sidewalk overnight. Meanwhile, after George's question about bread causes the Soup Nazi to bar him from lunch, Elaine spots him in line trying again. While waiting, the two complain about Jerry's romantic behavior around his new girlfriend Sheila. And though George is successful in getting served this time, Elaine discovers just how tough the Soup Nazi can be when she's banned from eating there for two years. Kramer loses the armoire to a pair of sophisticated furniture thieves. And when a kiss in line costs Sheila a delicious bowl of soup, Jerry is prompted to claim he doesn't know her. Pointing out that he chose a bowl of soup over a woman, Elaine suggests he's acting even stranger than George. However, Jerry thinks it's George who's been acting strange, which puts the Seinfeld-Costanza friendship to the test. Meanwhile, the Soup Nazi gives Kramer an old armoire he's been keeping in his basement. Upon finding him making amends with Sheila, George decides to make a point about Jerry's romantic antics. But when he tries using his own silly terms of endearment with his fiancee Susan, George doesn't anticipate just how much she'll like it. Meanwhile, when her thank you for the armoire enrages the Soup Nazi, Elaine is determined to get revenge for his rudeness. And the recipes she's found hidden in his old armoire provide just the ammunition. Finally, as Jerry announces he's breaking up with Sheila after all, the Soup Nazi closes up shop for good, much to the dismay of his loyal customers.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E7
programme.desc: While George balks at giving his secret bank code to Susan, Jerry is hired to do a commercial for appliance dealer Leapin' Larry. However, when Jerry's foot falls asleep during their first meeting, the one-legged Larry is sure he's being cruelly mocked. And when Jerry's friend Fred doesn't remember her from a party, Elaine wants to know why, while Kramer's fascination with firefighters leads him to buy an emergency scanner. Meanwhile, in hopes of salvaging an evening with Elaine and her boss, clothing catalog legend J. Peterman, Jerry tricks George into joining them. When Elaine gets another offer from Fred, she calls Peterman to cancel...but not Jerry and George. So when Jerry comes up with an excuse, too, George ends up at a hospital with Peterman's dying mother, where his bank code becomes her final word. Stranded by Elaine once again at the funeral, George is left with Peterman, who's intent on uncovering the meaning behind his mother's dying words. Meanwhile, after apologizing to Leapin' Larry, Jerry accidentally sets his appliance store ablaze and unknowingly helps Kramer realize a lifelong dream of driving a hook and ladder truck. Told of a fire at Leapin' Larry's, Peterman takes George to see if they can help. Spotting someone with his sleeve stuck the burning building's automated teller machine, Peterman demands George's secret bank code to help rescue the endangered man. And upon learning that the code and his mother's dying words are one and the same, he accuses George of killing her. Finally, other than satisfying her curiosity, Elaine realizes that dating Fred was a big mistake.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E8
programme.desc: When Elaine has an extra ticket to a museum's costume show, Jerry suggests asking Susan. However, worried about mixing his life with Susan with that of his friends, George tries to keep it from happening. While at the movies with Kramer, Jerry runs into the recently fired pool man at his health club. And though Jerry tries discouraging him, Ramon ends up joining them for the evening. Meanwhile, when his new phone number bring a flurry of wrong number calls for Movie Phone, Kramer takes it upon himself to help as many callers as he can. Uninterested in his friendship, Jerry tries to let Ramon down gently. But Ramon assumes that it's because he cleans pools for a living, and getting his job back at the club provides the perfect opportunity for revenge. Yet, when Jerry tries to even the score, he nearly kills Ramon while getting himself and Newman banished from the club. After refusing to join them at the coffee shop, George is furious to learn Susan is at the movies with Jerry and Elaine. So he calls Movie Phone to find out where he can find them to put an end to their developing friendship. But he gets Kramer instead. And when George's impatience sends him to the wrong theater, he's thrown out for creating a disturbance. However, he needn't have bothered since Susan already decided she's ill-suited for Jerry and Elaine's company.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E9
programme.desc: While sponsoring Kramer for an AIDS Walk, Jerry spots the name of an old college classmate on the sign-up sheet. Over Elaine's objections, he copies down Lena Small's phone number and calls her for a date. Worried that Lena would mind, Jerry then keeps secret just how he got the number until he's forced to tell George in confidence. But an argument over secrecy prompts George to tell Susan everything, including Jerry's secret. Meanwhile, when her favorite birth control device, the Today Sponge, is taken off the market, Elaine searches high and low until she finds the last remaining case. When Susan sends him to pick up some birth control so they can make up after their fight, George discovers she uses the sponge, too. Knowing Elaine has the last remaining case, he heads for her apartment. But after refusing George's request to borrow one, Elaine also has second thoughts about sex with her boyfriend Billy for fear of depleting her precious supply. Meanwhile, Jerry fears are confirmed when Susan starts a chain of phone calls which eventually lead to Lena hearing how he got her number. And Kramer's refusal to wear an AIDS Ribbon makes him a pariah among his fellow walkers. Though George claims not to like them, Susan persuades him to use a condom for their "make-up sex." But the pressure of opening the wrapper proves too daunting, leaving them unsatisfied. Then, after subjecting Billy to some rigorous questioning, Elaine decides to use one, but only one, of her sponges on him. Meanwhile, when Lena is okay with how he got her phone number, Jerry begins to think she may be too good for him. However, discovering her own large supply of sponges cause him to reconsider. But it's Jerry's other little secret -- changing the size on the label of his jeans to make them appear smaller -- that finally turns Lena off.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E10
programme.desc: To help revive an old movie theater, Kramer calls on George's childhood neighbor Lloyd Braun, who's recovering from a nervous breakdown. Gloating over Lloyd's misfortune, George runs into his old neighbor Pop Lazzari. But when his daughter Deena reveals he gave up his garage after a nervous breakdown of his own, it's too late for him to keep Pop from working on George's car. Uncomfortable about sitting with Lloyd at the theater, Elaine claims Jerry forgot his glasses and asks to be put in the front row. And to protect Lloyd's feelings, Kramer gives Jerry a pair of glasses from the theater's lost and found. But when Kramer learns they belong to the guest of honor at the theater's grand reopening, he trades them for a much stronger pair, making it virtually impossible for Jerry to see. Meanwhile, a pair of revealing accidents convince Lloyd that Elaine is coming on to him. Though upset with the noises now coming from his car, George is excited when Deena suggests they get together --- until discovering she thinks he's on the verge of a nervous breakdown. And listening to George blame everyone from her father to a coffee shop cashier for a fire that destroyed his car only reinforces the belief. Yet, it's seeing George promoting a theater matinee dressed as King Henry the Eighth that convinces Deena he's insane.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E11
programme.desc: With her new relationship with jazz musician John Germaine going well, Elaine lets Jerry in on the news. However, when Jerry then mentions it to a member of John's band, she worries about appearing too eager. Meanwhile, wanting to make a good impression, George's dad insists on bringing a special loaf of rye bread to a dinner with Susan's parents. And after a buying spree at a bulk discount store, Kramer agrees to drive a friend's hansom cab for a week. While returning home from their disastrous dinner, George discovers his dad kept the loaf of marble rye they brought as a gift. While George insists it was just an oversight, Frank and Estelle are sure the Rosses didn't serve the bread on purpose. And when it's found to be missing, Mr. Ross is certain that the Costanzas took it back. Meanwhile, her next date convinces Elaine that Jerry's remarks have caused John to cool towards her. When George decides to secretly replace the bread, he hires Kramer to give Mr. & Mrs. Ross a hansom cab ride for their wedding anniversary and sends Jerry to buy a replacement loaf. However, Jerry's arrival with the bread is delayed when he must fight an elderly customer for the bakery's last loaf. And Kramer's horse's extreme case of flatulence causes the Ross's cab ride to be cut short. So, upon returning home early, they catch George and Jerry trying to sneak the rye bread inside. Finally, after Elaine admits she's interested in him, their quick trip to John's apartment ends up jeopardizing his career.

programme.title: Seinfeld S7E12
programme.desc: When leaving his car at work for several days creates the impression that he's a real go-getter, George is considered for a big promotion. Letting his car do all the work, he sneaks away for a few days with Susan. However, upon realizing that restaurant fliers piling up on the windshield will give him away, he calls Jerry for help. Meanwhile, Kramer is sure his new caddy Stan can help get his golf game in shape to turn pro. Elaine is irritated by an old high school classmate's display of her ample breasts. But giving her a bra as a birthday gift backfires when Sue Ellen wears it as a top. And as they are taking George's car to be washed, Jerry and Kramer have an accident after being distracted by Sue Ellen's new look. Meanwhile, when his boss sees the damaged car, he's convinced George has been in an accident. Certain that he's dead, the Yankee's owner personally delivers the bad news to Frank and Estelle before giving their son's promotion to someone else. With an injured shoulder jeopardizing his golf game and his future, Kramer decides to make Sue Ellen pay. But, while Elaine is assigned the task of making the bra J. Peterman's next big item, Jerry has second thoughts about helping with the lawsuit, especially after meeting the lovely Sue Ellen. Finally, Kramer's case against her is ruined when he asks that Sue Ellen try on the bra in court.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers

programme.title: Flipping Bangers

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It's an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. (S8 E13)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day. (S8 E14)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title. (S8 E15)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two girls decorate a pot. Teletubbies love to play, but one by one, their favourite things go missing. Where can they be?

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games, she resorts to cheating.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: There's someone...or something strange in the neighborhood and the kids imagine the worst - but Strawberry finds it's a new girl, Blueberry Muffin.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: Where, Oh, Where Has Our Blueberry Gone?
programme.desc: Blueberry has become obsessed with the mystery book detective heroine, Patti Persimmon. She decorates her store with Patti posters and rearranges her shelves to make room for all the Patti books she's ordered. Blueberry begins to neglect outings with her friends and even goes so far as to dress like her idol just to emulate her. She then starts looking for cases to solve around town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Getting Out the Vote
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya for Heartlake High Class President. But when Tanya resorts to dirty tricks, Stephanie decides to give her a taste of her own medicine. Elect Tanya as Heartlake High Class President?! "NOOOOOOOO!!!!" Not if Friends Stephanie, Emma, Olivia, Mia and Andrea can help it. The Friends are there to help their pal Matthew defeat Tanya -- even when Emma gets carried off by "Vote For Matthew" balloons! But Tanya figures since "Daddy" is now the Mayor of Heartlake City, she doesn't have to play by the rules. When she sneakily sabotages Matthew's campaign, it's time for a determined Stephanie to take his place as candidate. With the help of her friends, Stephanie is set on running a clean campaign -- that is, until Tanya resorts to more dirty tricks, and Stephanie decides to give Tanya a taste of her own medicine.

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: brute and worse - the boys locker room!they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angry frantic race against time when Emma discovers that her As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? More BFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, twisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! The Friends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into a text that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma's undying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma's innocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- a

programme.title: The Grateful Dud
programme.desc: At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a teen bulldozer named Fiona. But when Fiona's pushy, over-the-top appreciation makes Mia's life a living nightmare, the Friends must Ride To The Rescue! At the Country Club where she teaches horseback riding after school, Mia's heroic rescue of a puppy and horse earns the overwhelming gratitude of their owner, a brassy teen bulldozer named Fiona. Although Fiona means well, her pushy, over-the-top appreciation soon makes Mia's life a living nightmare: embarrassing Mia at school, scaring away her boyfriend, and causing major havoc at the Country Club. The Friends must find a way for Mia to escape Fiona's nonstop gratitude and foil Tanya's sneaky schemes to get Mia kicked out of the club. And when a crisis erupts at the club's Fall Ball and Horse Show, all the Friends have to do some fancy riding to help their BFF save the day.

programme.title: Black Out
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd. After destroying the Power Station, the Ninja have dealt a massive blow to the Nindroids, but find getting back to the city troublesome without power. At the Junk Yard, Zane gives half of his heart to revive Pixal to help give guidance in their greater mission. Meanwhile, a mysterious cloaked Interloper steals the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord and creates a new foe for the Ninja to fight… Tech Wu. On the other side of Ninjago, Lloyd is trained by his father to harness his Golden Power to unlock an even greater potential – the power of the First Spinjtzu Master.

programme.title: The Curse Of The Golden Master
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas' search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd. The Ninja return to a powerless New Ninjago City and visit the Serpentine Tombs in effort to solve who had taken the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord – only to discover the snakes have gone straight. They learn of Serpentine Lore that a Golden Master will conquer all of Ninjago. The Nindroids attack, but with the help from Scales and his Serpentine ilk, they fight off the enemy and discover the culprit they are after is none other than Pythor! But it's too late… the Digital Overlord and his henchman have captured Lloyd in a plot to sap his Golden Power to finally become flesh.

programme.title: Enter The Digiverse
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive. Unable to save Lloyd in time, the Ninja resort to drastic measures. With the help from Borg's advanced technology, the Ninja get digitized with their Techno Blades into the Digiverse in order to battle the Digital Overlord on his own turf and erase evil for good. While the Ninja learn new capabilities and explore the fantasy of a ‘digital world', their friends must protect them from Pythor and his army in the ‘real world'. In the climatic conclusion, the Ninja ‘reboot the system' and save Sensei Wu and Lloyd, but the Digital Overlord has managed to become flesh in the nick of time, only to be in a weakened state.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend. The loss of Zane has fractured the team of Ninja, but when a mysterious invitation to Master Chen's ‘Tournament of Elements' arrives, everything is thrown into question – Is Zane alive, and are there others out there with powers like them? Sensei Garmadon warns them not to trust Master Chen, but they go in order to find Zane and make the team whole. On route to the island, the Ninja are briefly introduced to the other unique fighters with elemental powers, and the mysterious and beautiful Skylor intrigues Kai. Kai gets into a humbling scrap with Karlof, the Master of Metal, and learns some fights must be done on your own.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.desc: Competing over who can ask Zoey to join their Sheep Week team, Logan cheats and unwittingly endangers the video game based Cyber Realm.

programme.title: The Smurfomatic Smurfolator
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel still wants to destroy the Smurfs. This time, he sends on the forest the seeds of a creeping weed that is sure to entangle all the Smurfs… But Handy Smurf has devised a smurfomatic smurfolator...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bigmouth Smurf: Plotting to rid himself of the Smurfs, Gargamel casts a spell over Bigmouth and disguises himself as a Smurf. Thinking he is a Smurf, Bigmouth nearly succeeds in wrecking everything in the Village of the Smurfs until Papa Smurf comes up with a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Enchanted Didey: When Gargamel is able to make a flying carpet out of a patchwork quilt, accidents are bound to happen...The result of one accident is that a piece of the flying bedspread is used as Baby Smurf's diaper, with very surprising results...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lost In The Ages: How do you bring a baby triceratops back to his mama and papa? The Smurfs are doing their best, dodging dinosaurs and mysterious beings that live in prehistoric caves...

programme.title: Heavenly Smurfs
programme.desc: Once again, Gargamel's infallible plan to catch the Smurfs has been foiled. But the Smurfs play a trick on him: disguised as tiny blue angels, they will teach him to mend his ways...

programme.title: The Smurfs' Firebrigade
programme.desc: The Smurf village institutes a fire brigade to battle the flames in Greedy's kitchen only to discover that Gargamel has taken all of their water. Not realizing the weakness of his dam, Gargamel and Azrael are washed away when it breaks and floods the Smurf village, extinguishing the fire.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfily Ever After: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurflings, Part I (Smurf Quest 1): Guess who's coming back to the Village of the Smurfs? Grandpa Smurf himself, who's been away for some five hundred years. He returns with grave news: the Smurfs will have to find the four magical elements to make the long life Stone, or their very existence is going to be in jeopardy. Can they do it in just one day?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurflings, Part II (Smurf Quest 2): Thinking a treasure is to be found, Gargamel follows the Smurfs every step: into Jack Frost's cave, then to the desert in search of the Pyramid of Zenobia, and in the West Wind's lair... The Smurfs must find the four elements of the long life Stone before sundown. But can it be done? Can the Smurfs preserve their very existence?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurflings, Part III (Smurf Quest 3): While the Smurfs left at the Village try to find Grandpa Smurf's box and survive a flood caused by a geyser, Grandpa himself, Papa Smurf, Sassette and a few Smurfs more try to secure the last missing element from a volcano guarded by the terrifying wooden Tikis... and Gargamel, with Azrael as usual, do their best to foul things up for the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Enchanted Quill: As if Gargamel didn't have enough troubles as it is. Now he is saddled with a new problem, a problem by the name of Scruple, a new apprentice. A lazy, insolent, good-for-nothing character who will help in getting hold of the enchanted quill, a magic pen that writes nothing but the truth... and is going, or so Gargamel hopes, to aid in catching the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Fire-Fighting Smurfs: Snappy doesn't always do as he is told. For instance, he is a little careless in putting out the campfire where the Smurfs have been roasting marshmallows. Even though the Smurfs are doing the impossible in trying to save the forest from the holocaust, the situation looks bleak. Snappy is hunted by remorse. And he would be even more so if he knew what the evil Gargamel is up to.

programme.title: Smurfing In Sign Language
programme.desc: The Smurfs meet a woodland elf, who teaches them sign language after Gargamel inflicts a no-speaking potion on them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfstone Quest: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: Smurfy Acres
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn there's no place like home when Gargamel gets the Book of Spells to conjure up a new and more beautiful place for the Smurfs to live a place that is very convenient for him to lay a trap for them!

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: The Rabbids are morons.
programme.desc: In order to get a little, Hibernation Rabbid divides the Junkyard into two separate zones with a border fence.

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
programme.desc: The rabbids have collected several pieces of armor from the knights' castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: The Rabbids are misunderstood artists.
programme.desc: By accident, the rabbids destroy the teleporta-TV.

programme.title: The Rabbids are having a party.
programme.desc: A rabbid discovers the immense power of music when he puts on some headphones.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids are too cold.
programme.desc: An old lady distracts a Rabbid, and he accidentally shuts himself inside a supermarket freezer.

programme.title: Rabbids are in the wild.
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid gives a Rabbid butler a old pictures of himself, frozen inside an ice cube.

programme.title: Mad Rabbid is unstoppable
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid and his assistant are on a mission to collect a uranium rod in a warehouse.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: The Rabbids take off.
programme.desc: The rabbids unintentionally help Zak and his childhood crush Zoey develop a romance…

programme.title: The Rabbids in Santa's country.
programme.desc: When Gina & John get out of power in their polar station, they create a new way to produce electricity.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too. (S1 E10)

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too. (S1 E11)

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: Megan is teased by her brothers because she is a poor skateboarder. Then they are called for a mission to investigate strange occurrences in Dubai, involving buildings and other structures breaking down. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves. (S1 E04)

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: The Spiez are sent to protect a famous TV spy actor from various incidents. To keep an eye on him, the Spiez are invited to be in his Spy show, with the guidance of their parents who think they won a contest. The actor is kidnapped and the Spiez rescue him. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Get Blake
programme.desc: Blake must master playing a wooden fish for a battle-of-the-bands performance with Skye. Followed by Sixty Second Dennis.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia discovers that the watch she received from her friend is actually a monitoring device for the Robotnik Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Close Encounter of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik's momma escapes from the home for mothers of villains and demands her birthday present! When she endangers Sonic and Tails, and they manage to have her taken back to the home, even Robotnik is glad to see her go.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Big Griz, leader of a group of biker-bear rebels, mistakes Scratch and Grounder for Sonic and Tails, and teams up with S and G to attack the real Sonic and Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Get a Life, Don't Save One
programme.desc: Donkey Kong saves Bluster's life, causing him to think he owes Donkey Kong a favor. He tries to protect Donkey Kong from everything, while Diddy and Funky try to stop him from doing it.

programme.title: SONIC X Sonic's Scream Test
programme.desc: Chris' mother Lindsey is shooting a movie in an old castle and Sonic and his friends are there to visit as well. However, they begin to notice that something is amiss as ghostly figures begin to appear.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Rainbow Rumble
programme.desc: The top two gamers meet head-to-head in the final challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players race to the finish line to be crowned the ultimate gamer!

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Meet the Gamers
programme.desc: Host Frankie view gets to know the Kidaverse Roblox Rumble gamers. Get to know their awesome personalities and strategies for the competition.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Orangutango
programme.desc: Donkey Kong and Candy train to compete in a dance contest against King K. Rool and Krusha. Because Donkey Kong can't dance, he wants some help from Funky.

programme.title: SONIC X Cruise Blues
programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are on a cruise when the Egg Fort appears inside a glacier. As Sonic faces his foes, he receives some help from Knuckles.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble KC Raceway
programme.desc: Join the gamers in their first challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers race to victory and earn their first round of points

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Yeti Set Go
programme.desc: Things get chilly as the gamers snowball into their second challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the kids battle the yetis to make it to the top of the icy mountain.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Double Date Trouble
programme.desc: Donkey Kong tries have lunch with Candy on her day off and watch a movie with Diddy at the same time. He also has to get Bluster to replace some of the booby traps around the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: SONIC X The Adventures of Knuckles and Hawk
programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City. There he is confronted by some local thugs Li Yan and the Bruiser Boys.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Jungle Jump
programme.desc: Welcome to the jungle and the 6th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers take on cranky crabs and hungry sharks as they make their way through this tropical obstacle course.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Garden Gauntlet
programme.desc: The competition grows and the gamers meet their 7th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players get lost in this hectic hedge maze.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Cranky's Tickle Tonic
programme.desc: Cranky tries to stop Eddie the Mean Old Yeti's constant noisy groaning. Meanwhile, Donkey Kong and Diddy follow the runaway Crystal Coconut, that floated out of Cranky's house due to a magic spell.

programme.title: SONIC X The Dam Scam
programme.desc: When Sonic, Tails, Chris and the Egg Fort crash land on the Nature Continent after a fight, Tails and Chris protest against a dam while Sonic is caught in a battle against Decoe, Bocoe, E-65 and Eggman

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Sweet Escape
programme.desc: The competition is down to the final four! Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers run through this sugary sweet obstacle course for the chance to become the ultimate gamer.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Dune Dash
programme.desc: The top three gamers meet in the desert to race their way into the finale. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players battle the sand, snakes, and scorpions in this cactus race course.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.
