programme.desc: The story follows a group of birds on a journey where they try to find a better life for themselves and the ones they love.

programme.title: Joey & Ella: A Kangaroo Tail
programme.desc: When a baby kangaroo gets accidentally swept up in a jewelry heist, she becomes separated from her mother for the first time in her young life.

programme.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programme.desc: After elderly druid Getafix falls out of a tree, he resolves to find a young successor to whom he can entrust the secret formula for the magic potion that makes his village the only one in Gaul still unconquered by the Romans.

programme.title: Sexy Therapy
programme.desc: A failed Brooklyn writer, Nathan Fisher, visits his ailing parents in Florida. His mother has Alzheimer's and his father has recently had a stroke and his girlfriend has recently broken up with him.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking & optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly's life as a last minute replacement host.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: A government experiment inadvertently creates a time warp and suddenly a dangerous World War Two battleship appears. Stars Malcolm McDowell (2012).

programme.title: STORM CELL
programme.desc: A super storm is on its way to destroying Seattle.

programme.title: Earthstorm
programme.desc: The moon becomes unstable after it is hit by a gigantic asteroid...and this collision has the potential to devastate planet Earth. Stars Stephen Baldwin (2006).

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: The first humans on Mars do what they must to survive the cosmic elements and each other. Starring Jonny Lee Miller (2021)

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: One thousand years after cataclysmic events forced humanity's escape from Earth, Nova Prime has become mankind's new home. Legendary General Cypher Raige returns from an extended tour of duty to his estranged family, ready to be a father to his 13-year-old son, Kitai.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns, moments of horrific injury, polar bear action and tense emotional scenes, Arctic will keep your hands clenched to your chair until its brilliant, breathless conclusion.

programme.title: Black Beauty
programme.desc: A young girl finds a way into the heart of a troubled horse

programme.title: Elle A Modern Cinderella Tale
programme.desc: Elle wants to be a singer/songwriter, but her dreams are cut short by the sudden death of her parents. She moves in with her adoptive uncle, who runs a small independent record label whose biggest act, Sensation, is also Elle's biggest pain. The pop music environment at the label, very different than the country roots she is used to, adds to Elle's feelings of loss and frustration, and her misplaced guilt, which is caused by the fact that her parents had been en route to her performance at the time of her death. But when she meets Ty Parker, a famous pop singer with a passion for "real" music, her repressed ambition is released through a revitalized interest in singing and songwriting.

programme.title: Hope Dances
programme.desc: Hope Douglas has a dream but her parents have thrown her into battle between playing sports and dancing ballet. When a tragedy strikes, Hope has to make a difficult choice that will decide her fate - which way does she go?

programme.title: A Date With Miss Fortune
programme.desc: A writer falls in love with a woman whose traditional family ties interfere with her life.

programme.title: Staged Killer
programme.desc: When a former co-host, Jake Everett, works his way back into the professional life of popular TV morning show host Naomi Spencer, the show's success skyrockets, but Naomi's personal life begins to fall apart. Naomi Spencer is a popular local television morning talk show host. AKA Good Morning Murder

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Hillary Spenser is known as 'The Angel of the East Wing'. However, a patient mistakes her compassion for adoration, fuelling his obsession to do whatever it takes to fulfil his misguided vision of their future together.

programme.title: Burning Rubber
programme.desc: John Travolta stars in this action-packed, testosterone-fuelled thriller! When his son joins a rival racing team, a retired car racing legend returns to the dirt track, sparking more tension and brutal competition between the father and son duo. Co-stars Hollywood veteran Michael Madsen and global sensation Shania Twain. Sparks are set to fly in this gripping tale rooted in high-speed danger!

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: The Man Without A Face
programme.desc: Chuck wants to leave home but can't make the grade for boarding school. Then, he finds out the disfigured recluse (Mel Gibson, "Braveheart") living nearby is an ex-teacher.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: A CIA operative's identity is leaked by the government as payback for an op-ed article her husband wrote.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: A Duke's son leads his warriors against an evil baron and tries to destroy a galaxy-wide 'spice' trade.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: The Way
programme.desc: Martin Sheen plays Tom, an American doctor who comes to France to collect the remains of his adult son who was killed in the Pyrenees in a storm while walking The Camino de Santiago - also known as 'The Way of Saint James'. Driven by his desire to understand his lost son, Tom decides to embark on the historical pilgrimage, leaving his California life behind. Armed only with his son's backpack and guidebook, he begins the 800km historical pilgrimage but soon discovers that he won't be alone on this journey - he meets other pilgrims from around the world, all broken and looking for greater meaning in their lives. From the hardship experienced along "The Way" an unlikely group of misfits are bonded and Tom begins to learn the difference between 'The life we live and the life we choose.'

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munro's 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: Bernie
programme.desc: In small-town Texas, an affable mortician strikes up a friendship with a wealthy widow, though when she starts to become controlling, he goes to great lengths to separate himself from her grasp.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must confront a terrifying monster when they break down on a deserted road.

programme.title: Run The Tide
programme.desc: Taylor Lautner (Twilight) and Constance Zimmer (House of Cards) star in this emotional drama on family and new beginnings. When their drug abusing mother is released from prison, Rey kidnaps his younger brother Oliver and escapes their desert home for the California coast, determined to rebuild their family. A moving story of love and forgiveness co-starring Johanna Braddy (Easy A). A must watch!

programme.title: Cardboard Boxer
programme.desc: Touching and uplifting- this powerful tale of loss, redemption and friendship stars Academy Award nominees Thomas Haden Church (Sideways) and Terrence Howard (Prisoners) and Boyd Holbrook (Narcos). Living rough on the cruel streets of LA, Willie fights other homeless men to earn cash. But when he finds a young girl's diary in the bins, he is unaware that his life is about to change.

programme.title: The Last Witness
programme.desc: BAFTA Award Nominee Piotr Szkopiak directs this unmissable political thriller, based on the harrowing true events of the Katyn Massacre in Spring 1940. While investigating a spate of suicides by resettled Polish soldiers, ambitious journalist Stephen (Alex Pettyfer) is embroiled in a dangerous conspiracy concerning the execution of 22,000 Polish military and civilians by Stalin's secret police.

programme.title: Occupation: Rainfall
programme.desc: From the VFX team behind The Last Jedi, this sci-fi action epic stars Harry Potter's Jason Isaacs, The Mandalorian's Temuera Morrison and The Hangover's Ken Jeong. After an intergalactic invasion of Earth, the resistance uncover a plot that could see a decisive end to the war. But with the alien invaders hell-bent on making Earth their home, the race is on to save the planet.

programme.title: Can't Buy My Love
programme.desc: Lilly, a hard-working paramedic, is focused on her job and medical school. When wealthy slacker Jeff enters her life she wants nothing to do with him, but as she spends more time with him she starts t

programme.title: Love, For Real
programme.desc: Hayley and her best friend Bree go on a reality dating show to publicize her fashion line, but nothing goes as planned when love, friendship, and careers are on the line.

programme.title: Raise a Glass to Love
programme.desc: An aspiring Master Sommelier Jenna returns to her family vineyard and is fascinated by the natural methods of the new winemaker. Starring Laura Osnes (2021)

programme.title: Love Knots
programme.desc: Jodie fears her town's heritage will be spoilt by a development tycoon and so enlists straight-laced Will to design a new marina that will compliment the town's heritage and traditions. (2021)

programme.title: Stepping Into Love
programme.desc: Claire has the difficult task to help a maverick artist exhibit a success. In the short time she spends with Devan, the developer their feelings grow but will their story lead to a happy ending?

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: The Song To My Heart
programme.desc: After a childhood on the road with her legendary singer-songwriter father, teashop owner BONNIE HIGHSTREET, wants nothing to do with the music business, but when she helps music sensation RYDER JAMISON, develop lyrics for his new solo album, she rekindles her long abandoned dream and falls in love.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Kelly is a young, creative, ambitious events planner in New York City and quickly gaining a reputation as one of the best in the business. But when Joe, an influential website editor, hires her to organize his niece's 10th birthday party, Kelly quickly realizes that she may have just met her match.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a break-up, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: Coffee Shop
programme.desc: A small-town coffee shop owner's romance with a struggling playwright from New York is threatened when her shop goes into foreclosure and her ex-boyfriend returns to town to save it.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: A sexy, modern telling of Jane Austen's "Persuasion." Wren (Alicia Witt: Orange is the New Black) is a happy, single and self-confessed workaholic who, after rising to the top of the corporate ladder, finds herself coming home to her cat every night.

programme.title: All Summers End
programme.desc: After a summer prank goes awry, a teenage boy falls in love while grappling with his guilty conscience.

programme.title: Love Finds You In Valentine
programme.desc: What can a California girl do with a few dusty acres of land in rural Nebraska? So Kennedy Blaine wonders after she inherits a ranch in the small town of Valentine, Nebraska. As Kennedy makes arrangements to sell the property, she finds herself drawn to the ranch and to its attractive manager, Derek Sterling. She decides to spend the summer in her ancestral home and reconnect with family members. But soon Kennedy is subjected to harassment by someone who clearly wants her to leave Valentine. Depending on God's protection and Derek's assistance, she sets out to discover who is behind the offenses. But when her search reveals painful details about her family and raises questions about Derek's own past, will Kennedy still want to know the truth?

programme.title: Horse Camp – A Love Tail
programme.desc: It's a new year at summer horse-riding camp but everything is different this time-a new head counselor, new friends to make, and to spice things up, the ranch hand has a crush on the head riding instructor. When he is too nervous to reveal his feelings, the campers put competition aside and rally together to help him win over her heart while building friendships that will last a lifetime.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: From The Heart
programme.desc: Kathy Yoder has left her Amish ways and is a successful travel guide writer. When Kathy goes home to settle her dad's affairs, she's reminded of her life before she left the Amish community, including her old love, Isaac. Will Kathy decide to stay or return to her traveling lifestyle?

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: Secrets of Eden
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie centers on Stephen Drew (John Stamos).

programme.title: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: A high school history teacher's perfect life is disrupted by a sex scandal.

programme.title: Her Secret Killer
programme.desc: Emma sets out to find the identity of her donor.

programme.title: Secrets in the Desert
programme.desc: Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: Secrets of Eden
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie centers on Stephen Drew (John Stamos).

programme.title: The Great New Wonderful
programme.desc: The Great New Wonderful weaves five stories against the backdrop of an anxious and uncertain post-9-11 New York City.

programme.title: Single & Sexy
programme.desc: Sam (Kevin Sorbo), Nick (Carlos Ponce), and Robert find themselves in a love triangle with Amy (Haley Webb).

programme.title: Maria My Love
programme.desc: A young woman named Ana is struggling to deal with her mother's death and her father's mistakes. In an effort to feel better, she reconnects with her half-sister Grace, (Lauren Fales) and, inspired by a new boyfriend (Brian Rieger), sets out on a quest to find someone to help. Though excited and hopeful when she meets an eccentric woman named Maria (Karen Black), she soon discovers Maria is a compulsive hoarder, and is swept up in a situation more emotionally and morally complicated than she had expected to find. Inspired by a true story.

programme.title: Late Bloomer
programme.desc: A woman falls for a guy who bullied her in high school.

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: New York "date doctor" Alex Hitchens (Will Smith) tries to charm gossip columnist Sara Melas (Eva Mendes) at the same time he is coaching shy Albert (Kevin James) on how to win the love of beautiful heiress Allegra Cole (Amber Valletta).

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: A woman (Lopez) takes a job as a chambermaid at a luxury hotel in New York. She meets and falls in love with a debonair heir to an America political dynasty (Fiennes), who mistakes her for a society woman. When her real identity is revealed, the truth sets in about the disparity of their lives.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer's search for Mr. Perfect has left her hopelessly single. She's in for a rude awakening when her bosses team her with Mike Chadway, a hardcore TV personality who promises to spill the ugly truth on what makes men and women tick.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A Hawaiian island playboy has to use his imagination to win over the girl of his dreams when he discovers she has no short-term memory. Every night he is erased from her memory so he has to make her fall in love with him all over again the next day...and the next...and the next!

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: New York "date doctor" Alex Hitchens (Will Smith) tries to charm gossip columnist Sara Melas (Eva Mendes) at the same time he is coaching shy Albert (Kevin James) on how to win the love of beautiful heiress Allegra Cole (Amber Valletta).

programme.title: The Black Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two black bounty hunters arrive in a small western town on the trail of an outlaw. Finding the town without a sheriff, they take charge, much to the displeasure of the mostly white townsfolk. As they chase women, demand money, and stir up trouble, they wait for the right moment to capture their prey, raising tensions along the way.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger and the Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Three Indians are murdered. Each was wearing a medallion when he died.

programme.title: The Great Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: A blind man wants to get his mitts on a crooks' gold. He can't do it alone, so he hires the quartet of soldiers-of-fortune to help him.

programme.title: The Daring Caballero
programme.desc: Cisco learns that Pappy Del Rio, the town's leading citizen, is set to be hanged for murder. The Padre believes Pappy is innocent, so Cisco breaks him out and hides him. While on the run, Cisco encounters the Mayor, an outlaw he knows under a new name, and suspects he's the real murderer. Cisco sets out to prove the Mayor's guilt and clear Pappy's name.

programme.title: The Ballad of a Gunfighter
programme.desc: An outlaw and his partner feud over the same woman.

programme.title: Heavens Above!
programme.desc: Amanda occasionally baby-sits for friends and neighbors, so when the newly-arrived couple in the village ask her to sit for them, she accepts.

programme.title: Man In The Moon
programme.desc: Scientists are looking for a man to send up to be the first man on the moon.

programme.title: ONE WAY OUT
programme.desc: Superintendent Harcourt is investigating the suicide of a woman who is found wearing a valuable necklace recently reported stolen. Harcourt sets about battling against, Danvers, a crook that will do anything to stay out of prison.

programme.title: HIDDEN HOMICIDE
programme.desc: On the surface of a seaside holiday camp, it would appear that all those there have come for fun, dancing and swimming. But under this shallow facade are a group of people who have gone there either for excitement or escape.

programme.title: Intruder
programme.desc: Wolf Merton, a London stockbroker with a fine war record as Colonel of a Tank Regiment, has since lost touch with all the men who served under his wartime command. One evening he returns to his Belgravia home and finds that there is an 'intruder' in the house.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Skyman
programme.desc: The story of Carl who believes he experienced an alien encounter at 10-years-old and is now trying to reconnect with the UFO as the same location.

programme.title: Absolute Denial
programme.desc: In an escalating battle of two minds, a reclusive programmer is plunged into a terrifying, mind-bending revelation as he becomes exposed to the social engineering of his own sentient AI. Award-winning hand drawn animation.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: A young prince battles aliens and sorcerers to rescue his princess from the Beast on the fantastic planet Krull.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: A young American couple discover a rumored sunken World War II munitions ship while skin diving off the coast of Bermuda. Among the relics they find a cache of drugs recently stashed there, and before they know it they are embroiled in a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse with the gangsters who stashed it.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger is movie idol Jack Slater in Last Action Hero, which follows the adventures of 11-year-old Danny (Austin O'Brien), whose magic ticket blasts him out of his theater seat and into an action movie. There he teams up with Slater, living his wildest fantasies in a celluloid world where anything is possible.

programme.title: To The Wonder
programme.desc: After falling in love in Paris, Marina and Neil come to Oklahoma, where problems arise. Their church's Spanish-born pastor struggles with his faith, while Neil encounters a woman from his childhood.

programme.title: Percy vs Goliath
programme.desc: Small-town farmer Percy (Christopher Walken) takes on a giant corporation after they contaminate his crops in a desperate war against corporate greed.

programme.title: Astronaut
programme.desc: Richard Dreyfuss stars as a lonely widower who lies about his age when entering a competition to win a trip into space

programme.title: A Memory In My Heart
programme.desc: Rebecca Vega doesn't remember anything of her life prior to waking up in a hospital eight years ago. Now that she and her husband Joe have begun trying to have a child, she has been plagued with headaches and recurring nightmares.

programme.title: Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV
programme.desc: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the sacred Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis (Sean Bean) commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive..

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller that co-stars Eva Mendes, Sanaa Lathan and Dean Cain. In a small Florida town bordered by azure seas and sultry secrets, Chief of Police Matt Whitlock (Washington) finds himself caught in the eye of a storm.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Saturday Night's Alright! Saturday Night's Alright!

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: From the Amazon to the Andes, South America has some beautiful scenery. From guanacos sparring over grassland, to marine iguanas head-butting over a beachhead, to home-stealing hermit crabs, the quest for real estate causes a lot of conflict.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: With real-life duelling dragons, giant sumo-wrestling beetles, street-fighting monkeys, and sea turtles that play king of the hill on top of another sea turtle, Southeast Asia boasts a wide range of wildlife warriors.

programme.title: Age of Big Cats: World Domination

programme.title: Impossible Animals: Deserts

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When one of Tim's team-building events turns competitive, Georgie gets stuck partnering with Jade's cocky rival. Meanwhile, Amy and Cass have a falling out over Ty's partnership at the vet clinic until a close call forces them to reconcile. And Jack offers to help Tim with mounted orienteering in order to avoid lunch with Lisa's uppity aunt.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy helps a mounted archer reconnect with her horse, she also unravels the mystery behind Spartan's recent behavior. Meanwhile, Georgie is keen to tackle an exciting new challenge but her relationship with Adam is tested when he finds her spending time with another guy. Hoping they will finally have a chance to talk, Lou is surprised by Mitch's reaction when she unexpectedly descends on his solo fishing trip. And when Lisa accidentally throws out the key to his famous stew, Jack grows increasingly frustrated trying to recreate the recipe.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou is given a horse, Amy helps her sister nurture a connection with the animal while Lou wrestles with the implications of the unexpected gift. Meanwhile, a crisis at the Wildlife Reserve brings Georgie and Adam together and provokes them to take a risk. And when Jack faces a deadly threat it prompts Mitch to come clean about his past.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Fearing the worst, Jack is shocked to learn the reason for an old friend's unexpected visit to Heartland. Meanwhile, Amy intervenes when the new Extreme Team Coach pits Georgie and her teammates against each other. And Tim steps in when Jade's newfound status from a big sponsorship deal goes to her head and sends her down a dark path.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: An out-of-town horse clinic takes a dangerous turn for Amy, Tim and Georgie. Meanwhile, Lou's flight home is delayed and Jack is caught in the middle when Mitch's elevated status at Heartland begins to make Peter feel like an outsider. And when an endangered bear is shot by poachers Ty and Bob fight to save its life.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: While Amy deals with a panicked horse trapped in a trailer, Georgie heads off on a desperate search for Tim. Meanwhile, Bob and Ty tackle a difficult surgery to save an endangered bear cub's life. When Amy, Tim and Georgie are late returning from a clinic, Jack and Mitch head off to find them. And with the help of Lou and his girls, Peter makes a choice that assures his place in the Heartland family.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Georgie unexpectedly struggles with a new challenge, Amy steps in to help her unearth the cause. Then, Amy's worst fears are realized when an eager Tim attends a pregnancy clinic with her. Meanwhile, Jack deals with an upset Katie when Lou's delayed return to Heartland forces him to navigate “back-to-school” prep. Feeling caught in the middle, Amy grapples with keeping a secret when Cass is convinced that Caleb is cheating on her. And Jade is surprised to see a new side of Clay when he stands up for his Aunt Casey.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: After tragedy strikes, Amy and Georgie work together to help Tim's traumatized barrel-racing horse. Meanwhile, Jack helps Tim, Casey, and the entire rodeo community pull through a devastating loss. And Jade gets her permit to compete in the pros but quickly gets pulled into the party lifestyle of that world.

programme.title: Soviet Storm: WWII In The East

programme.title: Soviet Storm: WWII In The East
programme.desc: The German conquests of 1941 left Hitler's troops perilously close to the Soviet capital, Moscow.

programme.title: Goddess of the Night
programme.desc: Is the long-range effect of the moon really as great as popular belief claims? For example, 88 percent of the Germans believe in the lunar influence. The magic of the moon, is it myth or truth? The moon showed the early humans the right time for sowing and harvesting.

programme.title: Child of the Earth
programme.desc: What would people be without the moon? We owe its existence to a cosmic act of love: Scientists assume that the moon originated about 4.5 billion years ago through a collision of a planet with our earth. We all literally carry his DNA in us. But what makes our terrestrial moon so unique? And what do we humans owe to the distant celestial body?

programme.title: The 8th Continent?
programme.desc: Fifty years ago for the first time astronauts in the shape of Neil Armstrong and Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin, put their feet on the lunar surface. But does the rendezvous in space remain the climax in the relationship between man and moon? Or could the moon become our second earth in the future, maybe even the eighth continent?

programme.title: The Silicon Valley Revolution
programme.sub-title: How a few nerds did change the world
programme.desc: The Silicon Valley Revolution - How a few nerds did change the world - From Hippies to the first PC: Todays' Silicon Valley is the home for multi-million dollar IT companies. In the beginning, however, it was unsophisticated, colourful, chaotic, and revolutionary. Hippies and amateur entrepreneurs initiated an unprecedented revolution: the pioneers of the PC wanted to change the world in an attempt to dethrone the “Big Brother”.

programme.title: The Human Limits
programme.desc: The Human Limits - Season 1 - Physical Masters: In this part, the focus is set on four individuals going beyond their physical boundaries. There's freediving world record holder Herbert Nitsch who can hold his breath for more than nine minutes, Wim Hof who likes going for a walk in the Arctic preferably without clothes, human echolocation expert Daniel Kish who can ride a bicycle despite his blindness and Bavarian ice climbing champion Ines Papers.

programme.title: The Story of Europe
programme.desc: The Story of Europe - Commonalities and Division: Europe has been a battle concept for centuries: it often takes foreign enemies to weld the Europeans together. But for centuries, they are primarily fighting against themselves. It was not until the Enlightenment and the French Revolution of 1789 that a new idea of Europe emerged based on common values: freedom, equality and fraternalism.

programme.title: The Story of Europe
programme.desc: The Story of Europe - State of Play: Europe has never experienced such a long period of peace and prosperity as after the Second World War. When the Iron Curtain falls in 1989, the dream of a Europe united in peace and freedom seems finally to become reality. But whether financial or refugee crisis - the European euphoria has disappeared, nationalists are on the rise again.

programme.title: Thunder Boat

programme.title: Extreme Construction

programme.title: Extreme Construction
programme.desc: A look at the extreme construction behind the Paris Metro, a vital part of the city spanning nearly 137 miles.

programme.title: Sewers Of Paris: The Hidden City
programme.desc: Beneath the city lies a hidden world, a mirrored realm waiting for you to explore its rare secrets.

programme.title: The Private Lives of the Habsburg Rulers
programme.desc: This new Heritage Austria production gives three women a chance to have their say, providing an unrivalled insight into the life of the Habsburgs: the closest servant of Empress Maria Theresa, Carolina Countess Fuchs-Mollard, the friend of Emperor Franz Joseph Katharina Schratt and the daughter of Crown Prince Rudolf, Archduchess Elisabeth, who found her way to becoming a women's rights campaigner and went down in history as the "red Erzsi". Three actresses, Petra Morzé, Stephanie Schmiderer and Gigga Neunteufel, slip into the three historical roles and present the ladies at key moments in their lives: on the day Joseph II was born, after the assassination of Empress Elisabeth and on the day the First Republic was founded. All three biographies offer keyhole perspectives into the very personal lives of the ruling family.

programme.title: Elizabeth at 80: Continuity and Change
programme.desc: This touching programme covers the early years of Elizabeth's life, from colonies to independence and the emergence of a multi-cultured British society.

programme.title: The Story Of Prince Charles
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Prince Charles as a young man and the character behind the public façade

programme.title: A Modern Romance: Harry & Meghan

programme.title: Prince Philip: An Extraordinary Life

programme.title: Bastions of Power
programme.sub-title: Life behind the Walls of Europe
programme.desc: Castles were bastions of power. Yet, what was life like behind their walls? The documentary follows their development all through the Middle Ages, from simple wooden fortifications to the most elaborate strongholds and residences of knights and emperors. It takes us into their bed chambers as well as into their latrines, into their kitchens and their stables and onto their building sites. Archaeologists and historians dispel many of the myths and legends, that surround them even today.

programme.title: Seals

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In epsiode one we take a look at Kaua'i - the oldest island in the archipelago. Kaua'i's isolation for thousands of years led to an increased rate of evolution. In a relatively short time, new species are formed here, many animals and plants can only be found here. But they are in danger.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In episode two we take a look at Maui and Moloka'i. In the middle of the archipelago they form the heart of Hawaii. The second largest island of Hawai'i - Maui - is a true paradise for surfers. Archie Kalepa was one of the first big wave surfers and is still chasing the thrill today

programme.title: African Nostalgia
programme.desc: Wildlife photographer Valter Torri has always been fascinated by the unique atmosphere of Africa. In this film, colours are bright, the sounds of nature ring out - you can almost smell the dusty heat. Every frame is dramatic - the fiery sky, the flowing river and the elegant wildlife. But for Valter, this beauty is always tinged with longing - how to reconcile the modern world in which he lives with the timeless majesty of nature.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Hosted by Rhino Safari Camp, the epic safari continues back in the Matusadona National Park where Kristina is guided by Steve. They explore the lake-shore, encounter the hungry local pride and Marula, the resident elephant, makes a lunch-time appearance.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Tenerife is outstanding among the Canary Islands. If only because of the volcano Pico del Teide, which rises exactly 3.718 meters above sea level and is thus the highest mountain in Spain. But not only scenically Tenerife, the largest of the Canary Islands, stands out...

programme.title: Dream Islands of Europe: Lanzarote and Fuerteventura
programme.desc: The film presents the two Canary Islands Lanzarote and Fuerteventura. Lanzarote has a rich culture in addition to a volcanic landscape: the film accompanies a ceramic artist, an instrument maker, shows architecture by César Manrique and a camel breeder. On Fuerteventura, in addition to livestock farming and the operation of traditional grain mills, nature conservation plays a major role: islanders are committed to preserving the sand dunes, and there is a turtle hatchery. On Lanzarote, countless volcanic eruptions have formed a bizarre lunar landscape. It is a great challenge for the inhabitants to extract the cultivation of food from the karstic, dry soil. And yet they even manage to produce wine. Protected by thousands of small depressions that act as water reservoirs, they grow vines on porous volcanic rock.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Flower magic in Madeira: The Flower Festival Festa da Flor is the most important event of the year for the people of the Atlantic island. With it they celebrate spring, which is climatically practically all year round here, their island and themselves. The coast formed by lava, centuries-old laurel forests and green steep slopes make Madeira unique. Those who start right at the front of the big parade of the flower festival in the capital Funchal, will have made it. For Isabel Borges this dream has come true. She opens this year's flower parade along the harbour promenade with her festive group. This accolade does not only mean fame and prestige, but also a lot of pressure. Are the self-designed dresses splendid enough? Will the 150 flower children learn the dance steps in time? Will the flowers on the float hold out in the heat? For Isabel, it is now a matter of nerves.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Venice has been attracting people as if by magic for centuries. The Italians call her La Serenissima, or the sublime. Perched on wooden posts, she braves the elements and the huge, annual surge of visitors. Vogalonga is the name of a Venetian sports competition for women, in which the participants row their boats standing. This is a tradition that Guilia and Elena also follow. They train hard, as the yearly regatta is soon to begin. Anyone caught driving their water vehicle with more than 7 km/h through the canals of Venice, risks getting a ticket from local policewoman Lorenza Mariutti. The reason: the resulting waves gnaw at the foundations of the grand palaces. Venetians are very attached to their traditional cuisine. The island of Sant' Erasmo is the town's garden. Artichokes, radicchio, onions, everything that grows here is said to taste fantastic, thanks to the salt content of the air and water. Carlo and Claudio Finotello not only grow the vegetables, they even deliver directly to their customers' doors. At sunset, they sail through the lagoon with their boat, brimming with produce, towards San Marco. People waiting at the many bridges, now receive their wares: regional, seasonal, fresh. And without a hint of stress if possible. Like so many other things in Venice. Perhaps because La Serenissima is also known as "The Composed".

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Capri was already in ancient times a place for the rich and beautiful. Today Capri is one of the most famous islands in the world. Millions of tourists visit it. But there are in fact still unknown corners on the island in the Gulf of Naples. Thus, at the very top of Capri, there is a hermit monastery with a view to the Vesuvius.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Sardinia is the second-largest island in the Mediterranean. The Sardin-ians themselves say it's a "continent for itself", a virtual world of its own, full of magic: A beach, gleaming in unreal pink shades, red corals protect against the evil eye and the inhabitants seem to remain forever young. On Sardinia, the owners of luxury yachts adopt sheep, fish have gold in their bellies and a giant mussel supplies the material for legendary sea silk. No one is surprised, that the Madonna goes on a sea cruise once a year.

programme.title: Dream Islands Of Europe: Capri, Ischia and Procida
programme.desc: Capri and Ischia are world famous. From Naples, it's just a short hop over to the two islands. Perfect destinations, then, for a week's cruise along the Gulf of Naples and the adjoining Amalfi Coast to the south. There, Positano, Amalfi or Salerno as well as a handful of other mostly small harbor towns are extremely worthwhile destinations.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Corsica looks like an alpine landscape in the Mediterranean, an island with dramatic rock formations, romantic bays and proud inhabitants who see themselves first and foremost as Corsicans and only then as French. The Greeks in ancient times called the island Kalliste: the beautiful. We explore this fascinating mountain world in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: When you're surrounded by breathtaking mountain landscapes, it would be easy to rely on tradition and stay the same. However, this destination does the exact opposite. Whether it's creating a state-of-the-art museum to honor the United States' greatest athletes, modernizing its natural attractions so they're accessible to all, or creating a community that invites success, there's excitement in the air for what is new and innovative. See why Colorado Springs, Colorado is a Place to Love. (S1 E11)

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine's wild beauty. It's where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It's known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you'll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here's why Maine is a place to love. (S1 E16)

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: In St. Augustine, Florida, wandering is encouraged and time is meant to be savored. It's a historic powerhouse of a destination where local events not only shaped its history but an entire country's. With an unexpected food scene, protected wetlands, and miles of beautiful beaches to explore, there's a lot to sink your (shark) teeth into. Join Samantha as she explores America's oldest city – St. Augustine, Florida. (S1 E08)

programme.title: Globe Tasting
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's getting an authentic taste from all around the globe, including Latin fusion in California, real-deal Thai in Phoenix, and Sicilian specialties in New Jersey.

programme.title: America's Musical Journey
programme.desc: A cross-country adventure through the musical heritage of America and the cultural cities where America's music was born.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh embark on a fun-filled voyage through The Upper Peninsula of Michigan to experience the Sea Songs of the Great Lakes. Adventure is abound as they trek through lush forests, stunning waterfalls and even explore a historic shipwreck. Along the way, they meet folk legends Dan Truckey and Lee Murdock, who introduce them to the captivating world of sailors' tunes. From Lake Ballads to Sea Shanties, their journey culminates at the treasured Hiawatha Folk Festival, where campfire songs and communal vibes celebrate the region's enduring charm.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Known as the quintessential party music, Polka is alive and evolving in the great city of Milwaukee. At the beloved festival of Germanfest, Polka Hall of Fame legend Peggy Mueller showcases her traditional roots while The November Criminals share their fusion of polka and hip-hop, making it clear there is something for everyone. From buttonboxes to beers and brats, this is a city full of personality and a deep love for its musical heritage.

programme.title: Travel in Style
programme.desc: We visit floating Markets, Royal Palaces and the new spa and sauna of the Peninsula Hotel in Bangkok. Then it's off to the city that's so good they named it twice… New York!,

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: In this episode Morgan heads to Cairns, northern Queensland. From The Great Barrier Reef and rainforest of the Daintree to Port Douglas and Cape Tribulation, this episode is one for the adventurous travellers!

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: In this episode Morgan is kicking off an adventure through Japan. A train ride from Tokyo takes him to the mountainous interior and the ski resorts of Zao and Appi before heading south to the tsunami devastated region of Sendai.

programme.title: The Travel Bug
programme.desc: Still on his Japanese adventure, Morgan hops on a flight south to the warm and sunny island paradise of Okinawa.Despite only being a few hours flight from Tokyo, it seem like they're a world away -It's a hidden gem you're gonna fall in love with!
